title: The Lands of Bartis
description:
Vanilla + Modpack from Bartis
Good Performance and much to Explore
body:
Welcome my Minecraft Modpack loving friend,

you like exploring?

Then you are on the right path my traveller!

The Lands of Bartis is a up to date Modpack that has better Worldgeneration, beautiful new Biomes, more Dungeons and enhances most Aspects of Vanilla Minecraft by Far.

Better Performance with shaders and Distanz Horizons, more Food, more Mobs, better Structures of Vanilla Minecraft and so much more.

This updates gets updates, fixes and is going towards 1.21 as soon as possible and is gonna get Tinkers Construct for Mighty Smelting to make Armor, Weaponry and Tooling even better.

Im gonna link the Server Download for this Modpack later on so dont miss out :).
